name: swiss
title: Swiss
description: Local developer utilities powered by the swiss CLI — encode, hash, convert and generate, all offline.
author: huseyinbabal

commands.name: transform
commands.title: Swiss Transform
commands.subtitle: Swiss
commands.description: Run swiss conversions, encoders and hashes on your input and copy the result.

commands.name: generate
commands.title: Swiss Generate
commands.subtitle: Swiss
commands.description: Generate UUIDs, passwords and lorem ipsum locally.

commands.name: qrcode
commands.title: Swiss QR Code
commands.subtitle: Swiss
commands.description: Turn a value or URL into a scannable QR code, then copy or save the image.

preferences.name: swissPath
preferences.title: swiss Binary Path
preferences.description: Path to the swiss CLI. Leave blank to auto-detect (Homebrew / PATH).
